provider: HKUST 2025/26 BEng in Civil and Environmental Engineering Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records all 52 unique explicit course codes across the Engineering Fundamentals, required courses, bounded Environmental Restricted Electives, and Research Option. The open elective rules allowing other CIVL courses at 4000-level or above, eligible 3000-level or above Engineering School courses outside CIVL, and advisor-approved Research Option courses at 4000- or PG level are not expanded into fabricated closed lists. COMP1022P and CIVL4520 remain because the intake-specific PDF explicitly lists them, with their published last-offered years retained. CIVL4900 officially carries 1-4 variable credits and is stored with credits 0 so it remains unknown and does not enter local known-credit totals. The CIVL1000 school-based-admission exemption, alternative course paths, Environmental Elective minima, Research Option eligibility and declaration timing, CIVL4920 requirement, and advisor approval require manual review; this union course list must not be presented as a graduation-completion decision. University Common Core requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement.
